title: Fragrant Tender Jamaican Fish Wrap
description: Pungent, tender, romantic Jamaican dish featuring V sterbottensost cheese, served in a delicate lotus-leaf wrap.
instructions: Soak the lotus-leaf wraps in warm water for 10 minutes.
Season the salmon fillets with salt, black pepper, and Jamaican curry powder.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, add the coconut milk, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the salmon fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the chopped cilantro, minced garlic, and brown sugar in a small bowl.
Assemble the wraps by placing a cooked salmon fillet on each lotus-leaf wrap, followed by a slice of V sterbottensost cheese and a spoonful of the cilantro-garlic mixture.
